statement: In every magma, Equation 986 (`x = y * ((z * z) * (z * y))`) implies Equation 2808 (`x = ((y * z) * (z * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0093
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z z) (op z y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op z y)) x)
